scripts.build: pnpm --filter @chess-web/chess-core build && node ../../scripts/copy-stockfish-assets.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit && vite build
scripts.build:android: pnpm --filter @chess-web/chess-core build && node ../../scripts/copy-stockfish-assets.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit && VITE_APP_BUILD=1 vite build && node ../../scripts/build-offline-puzzle-pack.mjs --out dist/offline
